name: Umrao Hospitals
summary: A 120-camera hospital deployment offloaded to Konect by Voltas — a major trust signal.
challenge: A busy Mira Road hospital required reliable, round-the-clock surveillance across patient, public and restricted areas.
solution: The project was offloaded to Konect by Voltas, and Konect installed 120 cameras across the facility in 2011.
result: Voltas entrusting the work to Konect is a trust signal in itself — and the hospital gained complete, dependable coverage.
